response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep systems expertise in event-driven architectures, and hands-on exposure to AI-agent tooling at re:cinq, but lacks clear evidence of leading multi-agent AI systems at scale in regulated fintech environments, managing teams beyond 10 engineers, or designing financial risk/credit systems — key requirements for a CTO role.
strengths: Proven experience building event-driven, distributed systems with real-time data handling
Direct exposure to agentic AI infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership in tooling and observability
concerns: No demonstrated experience in fintech infrastructure, credit risk, or compliance systems
Lacks evidence of scaling engineering teams to 30+ or developing senior technical leadership layers
No clear track record of designing model-agnostic, auditable AI systems in high-stakes commercial environments
